title: Externalize prompts.py agent types and templates dir to config
description: Add supported_agent_types(config_types) function to prompts.py that returns config-provided types or falls back to BUILT_IN_AGENT_TYPES. Add optional agent_types parameter to guardrail_template_path and load_guardrail_template. Add optional templates_dir parameter to guardrail_template_path and load_guardrail_template, resolving relative paths against repo root. Update call sites in scheduler.py and runner.py to pass templates_dir=config.templates_dir and agent_types=config.agent_types when config is available.
acceptance_criteria: supported_agent_types() function added, returns config types or BUILT_IN_AGENT_TYPES fallback
guardrail_template_path accepts optional agent_types and templates_dir parameters
load_guardrail_template accepts optional agent_types and templates_dir parameters
BUILT_IN_AGENT_TYPES and DEFAULT_TEMPLATES_DIR remain as fallback constants
Call sites in scheduler and runner pass config values when available
Relative templates_dir resolved against repo root
